name: Spammies
subtitle: Family-run café in Morley, Leeds — proper food, all day.

address.full: Spammies, 135 Wide Lane, Morley, Leeds LS27 8DF

hero.title: Proper sandwiches. Proper breakfasts.
hero.text: A local, family-owned sandwich shop on Wide Lane — hot & cold sarnies, toasties, jackets, salads and a cuppa. Eat in or takeaway.
hero.imageNote: Replace public/images/hero/hero-placeholder.jpg with a photo of the shop

about.heading: Your local sandwich shop
about.text: Spammies is a small, family-run sandwich shop in Morley. We keep things simple: fresh fillings, generous portions, and a warm welcome — whether you're after an all-day breakfast, a BEST butty, or a quick tea on the way to work.

seo.title: Spammies Sandwich Shop | Morley, Leeds
seo.description: Family-owned sandwich shop in Morley, Leeds. Hot & cold sandwiches, breakfasts, toasties, jackets, salads and drinks. 135 Wide Lane, LS27 8DF. Tel 07902 771 542.

footer.note: Eat in or takeaway · Cash & card · Also on Just Eat
